response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack and AI-adjacent experience, including recent work with MCP and agentic workflows at Naver. His background in TypeScript, cloud platforms (AWS/GCP), and data pipelines aligns well with the role. However, his lack of explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and multi-agent frameworks (e.g., LangGraph/CrewAI) raises concerns. His educational background (BS in CS) meets the minimum requirement, but advanced degrees are preferred.
strengths: 8+ years of full-stack engineering with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP)
Recent experience with MCP and agentic workflows at Naver
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
Limited evidence of multi-agent system framework expertise (e.g., LangGraph/CrewAI)
Background lacks direct focus on GenAI-specific metrics and optimization techniques

key_factors.factor: Cloud platform and data pipeline expertise
